summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Code Audit Report Viewer app. All major functionality working correctly including dashboard stats, sidebar navigation, filtering, search, expandable cards, and Kanban board.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct stats (23 total, 4 critical, 7 high, 8 medium, 4 low)
Sidebar navigation works - all 6 sections accessible
Sidebar collapse/expand toggle functions correctly
Export Markdown button present and accessible
Bugs & Vulnerabilities section displays all 13 issues
Filter buttons work correctly (Critical=4, High=5, Medium=3, Low=1)
Search functionality works (FAISS search returns BUG-003)
Issue cards expand to show description, impact, evidence, and fix sections
GitHub deep links present and correctly formatted
Code tabs (Antes/Después) switch properly
Copy to clipboard buttons visible in code blocks
Syntax highlighting applied to code blocks
Refactoring section loads with 5 issues
AI/ML section loads with 6 issues and metrics
Architecture section shows Medallion diagram (Bronze/Silver/Gold)
Tech stack badges displayed correctly
Action Plan Kanban board shows 3 columns (Crítico=4, Medio=6, Bajo=4)
Action cards expand to show implementation steps
Quick navigation cards on dashboard work correctly
Charts render properly (PieChart and BarChart visible)
API endpoint /api/report returns complete JSON with correct structure
API endpoint /api/report/issues returns filtered issues correctly
API endpoint /api/report/export.md returns Markdown content
API filtering by severity works for all levels
API search functionality works (FAISS query returns results)
